PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\Estrategia\\Up\\epicas.txt"\); $bom0 = $bytes[0]; $bom1 = $bytes[1]; if \($bom0 -eq 0xFF -and $bom1 -eq 0xFE\) { $content = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString\($bytes, 2, $bytes.Length - 2\) } else { $content = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\) }; Write-Host "Lines: $\(\($content -split "`n"\).Length\)"; Write-Host "Length: $\($content.Length\) chars"; Write-Host "Has tabs: $\(\($content -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "`t" }\).Length\) tab-lines")
